title: Genie One enhancements
body:
* **Workspace-level Genie One customization**: Workspace admins can now customize Genie One at the workspace level. Under workspace settings, admins can configure colors, a logo, a markdown welcome message, and pinned content. See [Customize the Genie One homepage](/aws/en/genie-one/customize-genie-homepage).
* **Certified object prioritization**: Chat in Genie One now acknowledges and prioritizes certified objects.
* **User skills (Public Preview)**: You can now create personal user skills to extend chat in Genie One with custom capabilities. A skill is a repeatable task you teach Genie One once and run whenever you need it, such as building your weekly metrics report. See [User skills](/aws/en/genie-one/chat#user-skills).
* **Rich output (Public Preview)**: Genie One responses for non-SQL answers, such as search results and MCP reads, can now include rich HTML, CSS, and JavaScript content, enabling more varied data presentations beyond plain prose.
* **Genie Ontology (Public Preview)**: Genie One now automatically builds and maintains a map of your business by extracting and ranking knowledge from sources such as dashboards, notebooks, and pipelines, improving response accuracy and reducing latency. See [Genie Ontology](/aws/en/genie-one/chat#ontology).
